commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://efa-validation-<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>/manifests/stage1-mpijob-nccl-tests.yaml /tmp/stage1-mpi.yaml && kubectl --context ohio apply -f /tmp/stage1-mpi.yaml'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get mpijobs -n efa-validation'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n efa-validation -o wide'
